Thus have I explained in clear terms the prognostics of touch-
ing the limbs, after carefully examining the treatises on this science,
for enabling people to attain their cherished desires. An intelligent
and noble astrologer who knows all this, will always be honoured
by sovereigns as well as peoples.
[The metre is mfsnft]

Chapter LJI—Chat acieristies of Pimples
[This too is supposed to be a spurious chapter. However,
Bhattotpala comments upon it.]
% SlteNIHT inn
For the four classes of people beginning with the Brahmanas
pimples will be auspicious, if they are in order white, red, yellow
and black in colour. These colours are beneficial for the respective
